message:
fix(deps): update fsqlite to b908482d (macOS c_short VFS lock fix)

Previous update (b81d437a) still had i32/i16 type mismatches across all
posix_lock() call sites. The fix makes posix_lock()/posix_getlk() accept
impl Into<i32>, handling both Linux (i32) and macOS (i16) lock constants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
